THE SITUATION IN THE UNITED STATES (Source: "MORBIDITY AND MORTALITY-WEEKLY REPORT", U.S. National Office of Vital Statistics): Number of reported cases for the current week (previous week in parentheses):

Influenza incidence continues to decline in all parts of the united States. Deaths from all causes declined in every geographical division for the week ended December 14 from figures reported for the previous week. The totals for these weeks were 11,825 and 12,611, respectively.
ENTERED BY: Samara Manzin on June 21, 2021
